title: Out Focus Amateur Snapshot Asian Supermodel Standing
sourceTitle: Out Focus Amateur Snapshot Asian Supermodel Standing

imagePrompts.prompt: Out-of-focus amateur snapshot of an Asian supermodel standing in the middle of an old Taiwan street at night, glowing red lanterns lighting up the scene. She is eating a big juicy hamburger while seated at a street food table, happy mood. Warm color tones. Pinterest aesthetic. JPG.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Out-of-focus amateur snapshot of an Asian supermodel standing in the middle of an old Taiwan street at night, glowing red lanterns lighting up the scene. She is eating a big juicy hamburger while seated at a street food table, happy mood. Warm color tones. Pinterest aesthetic. JPG.
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

Out-of-focus amateur snapshot of an Asian supermodel standing in the middle of an old Taiwan street at night, glowing red lanterns lighting up the scene. She is eating a big juicy hamburger while seated at a street food table, happy mood. Warm color tones. Pinterest aesthetic. JPG.

imagePrompts.title: Out Focus Amateur Snapshot Asian Supermodel Standing

prompt: Out-of-focus amateur snapshot of an Asian supermodel standing in the middle of an old Taiwan street at night, glowing red lanterns lighting up the scene. She is eating a big juicy hamburger while seated at a street food table, happy mood. Warm color tones. Pinterest aesthetic. JPG.
originalPrompt: Out-of-focus amateur snapshot of an Asian supermodel standing in the middle of an old Taiwan street at night, glowing red lanterns lighting up the scene. She is eating a big juicy hamburger while seated at a street food table, happy mood. Warm color tones. Pinterest aesthetic. JPG.

promptTranslations.zh:
失焦的业余快照，一位亚洲超模在夜晚站在台湾一条古老的街道中央，红色的灯笼照亮了整个场景。她坐在街边的餐桌旁，心情愉快地吃着一个多汁的大汉堡。暖色调。 Pinterest 美学。 JPG。

#AIart #GPTImage2
promptTranslations.fr:
Instantané amateur flou d'un mannequin asiatique se tenant la nuit au milieu d'une vieille rue de Taiwan, des lanternes rouges lumineuses éclairant la scène. Elle mange un gros hamburger juteux alors qu'elle est assise à une table de cuisine de rue, de bonne humeur. Des tons de couleurs chaudes. Esthétique Pinterest. JPG.

#AIart #GPTImage2
promptTranslations.ru:
Расфокусированный любительский снимок азиатской супермодели, стоящей посреди старой тайваньской улицы ночью, а сцену освещают светящиеся красные фонари. Она ест большой сочный гамбургер, сидя за уличным столом с едой, в счастливом настроении. Теплые цветовые тона. Эстетика Pinterest. JPG.

#AIart #GPTImage2
promptTranslations.pt:
Foto amadora fora de foco de uma supermodelo asiática parada no meio de uma antiga rua de Taiwan à noite, com lanternas vermelhas brilhantes iluminando a cena. Ela está comendo um hambúrguer grande e suculento enquanto está sentada em uma mesa de comida de rua, feliz. Tons de cores quentes. Estética do Pinterest. JPG.webp.

#AIart #GPTImage2
promptTranslations.ja:
夜の台湾の古い通りの真ん中に佇み、赤く光る提灯が現場を照らすアジア人のスーパーモデルのピントの合っていないアマチュアのスナップショット。彼女は屋台のテーブルに座りながら、幸せな気分で大きなジューシーなハンバーガーを食べています。温かみのある色調。ピンタレストの美学。 JPG。

#AIart #GPTImage2
promptTranslations.ko:
밤에 대만의 옛 거리 한가운데에 서 있는 아시아 슈퍼모델의 초점이 맞지 않는 아마추어 스냅샷, 빛나는 붉은 등불이 현장을 밝게 비춥니다. 그녀는 길거리 음식 테이블에 앉아 행복한 기분으로 크고 육즙이 많은 햄버거를 먹고 있습니다. 따뜻한 색상 톤. 핀터레스트 미학. JPG.

#AI아트 #GPTImage2
